title: OptiFine Checker
description: A simple mod to check if OptiFine HD is loaded
body:
The license of Optifine prevents it from being distributed, but there are times when players may not install Optifine manually to the modpack's mod folder.

This mod will remind players to install Optifine when it detects that Optifine HD is not loaded properly.

![Image](https://s21.ax1x.com/2024/06/14/pkdlMu9.png)
